news.t: First Trust Announces Shareholder Approval of the New Investment Sub-Advisory Agreement for First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Developed International ETF

First Trust Announces Shareholder Approval of the New Sub-Advisory Agreement for First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Domestic ETF and Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting for First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Developed International ETF
First Trust Announces Adjournment of Special Shareholder Meeting for First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Domestic ETF and First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Developed International ETF

holdings.infoBox: HDMV is an equity ETF with a total of 154 individual holdings. The top holdings are CLP Holdings stock at 2.00%, Telstra Group at 1.98%, CapitaLand Ascendas REIT at 1.98%, CapitaLand Integrated Commercial Trust at 1.77%, and The Hong Kong and China Gas Company at 1.77%.

overview.description: The First Trust Horizon Managed Volatility Developed Intl ETF (HDMV) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund is an actively-managed fund of low expected volatility mid and large-cap stocks from developed markets. HDMV was launched on Aug 24, 2016 and is issued by First Trust.
